mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ai_session (session_id, session_type, session_title, user_id, target_id) VALUES (#{sessionId}, #{sessionType}, #{sessionTitle}, #{userId}, #{targetId})
mapper.select: SELECT session_id, session_type, session_title, user_id, target_id, create_time, update_time FROM ai_session WHERE session_id = #{sessionId} AND user_id = #{userId} LIMIT 1
SELECT session_id, session_type, session_title, user_id, target_id, create_time, update_time FROM ai_session WHERE session_id = #{sessionId} AND user_id = #{userId} AND session_type = #{type} LIMIT 1
SELECT session_id, session_type, session_title, user_id, target_id, create_time, update_time FROM ai_session WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND session_type = 'chat' ORDER BY update_time DESC
SELECT session_id, session_type, session_title, user_id, target_id, create_time, update_time FROM ai_session WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND session_type = #{type} ORDER BY update_time DESC
